data.title: Strategy (Ex-MicroStrategy) With Bullish Outlook, But Challenges Remain: Report
data.description: Strategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), formerly MicroStrategy, has drawn varied analyst reactions following its continued Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) accumulation and capital-raising initiatives, with analysts highlighting both

data.title: IQVIA Delivers Solid Q4 Growth Despite 'Choppy' Market Conditions
data.description: IQVIA reaffirms its 2025 outlook, projecting up to $16.13 billion in revenue and EPS of $11.70-$12.10. Strong TAS growth and solid R&DS bookings fuel confidence.

data.title: Peloton Pedals Past Q2 Sales Estimates, Stock Jumps On Solid Margins & Outlook
data.description: Peloton beats sales estimates in Q2, but posts a loss; forecasts FY25 revenue of $2.43B-$2.48B and strong Q3 gross margins.

data.title: Palantir Adds Elon Musk's AI Chatbot Grok To AIP
data.description: Palantir announced on Thursday that it has added xAI's large language model Grok to its AIP platform.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Q4 Earnings: Beats Estimates, Boosts Dividend 10%, CEO Highlights Strategic Growth
data.description: Thomson Reuters Corp reported 5% revenue growth in fiscal Q4 2024 to $1.909 billion, beating analyst estimates. Stock price increased after the report.
